name: echoPlus
description: An enhanced, modernized, and highly customizable UI overlay for the Echo360 video player with downloading capabilities.

content_security_policy.extension_pages: script-src 'self' 'wasm-unsafe-eval'; object-src 'self'; worker-src 'self'; media-src 'self' blob: https://*.echo360.org https://*.echo360.net https://*.amazonaws.com; img-src 'self' data: blob: https://*.echo360.org https://*.echo360.net https://thumbnails.echo360.org https://content.echo360.org https://picsum.photos; connect-src 'self' https://echo360.org https://echo360.net https://*.echo360.org https://*.echo360.net https://*.amazonaws.com
content_security_policy.sandbox: sandbox allow-scripts allow-forms allow-popups allow-modals; script-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline' 'unsafe-eval' blob:; child-src 'self' blob:; worker-src 'self' blob:;
